actionGuidance.rewrite-distractor: Replace the flagged option with a plausible common mistake from the same concept. Keep exactly 4 options and preserve the correct answer unless the audit says the correct answer is wrong.
actionGuidance.balance-option-lengths: Rewrite option wording so no option is visually cued by extreme length. Keep the same semantics.
actionGuidance.replace-generic-wording: Replace broad wording such as always/never/all answers with a concrete misconception.
actionGuidance.review-fill-leakage: Check whether the answer appears in visible code. If it gives the answer away or creates ambiguity, rewrite the code/hint with one clear blank.
actionGuidance.review-fill-ambiguity: Confirm the one-character answer is uniquely determined by the prompt and hint. If not, rewrite the prompt.
actionGuidance.add-routing-metadata: Add a real conceptKey from the lesson taxonomy so adaptive routing and prerequisites work.
actionGuidance.add-source-metadata: Add source metadata only when the item is actually from a legacy review archive.
actionGuidance.add-explanation: Add a concise explanation tied to the correct answer and the most likely misconception.
actionGuidance.add-fill-hint: Add a hint that narrows the answer without revealing it.
